title: Airo
description: Co-Op Advertising Program With Airo Brands To Drive Sell-Thru And Measurable Online Sales

howItWorks.title: JC delivers best-in-class programmatic display (prospecting, conquesting, retargeting).
JC Pixel attributes SKU- level sales back to media.
JointCommerce builds all ad creatives as an added value - approved by Glass Meadows.

campaignStrategy.description: JointCommerce targeted Airo's product shoppers across a curated publisher network, placing Airo's products directly in front of high-intent consumers. These shoppers were directed directly to the Airo Brands product pages on partnered retailer online stores, reducing friction in the purchase journey and increasing the likelihood of conversion.
campaignStrategy.technology: Our pixel technology continuously identified high-intent consumers who left the site or abandoned their cart and dynamically re-engaged them. This strategy re-engaged potential buyers and guided them back to the exact point where they previously left off.
campaignStrategy.reporting: All campaign activity and resulting purchases were reported through the JointCommerce real-time reporting dashboard, enabling SKU-level sales tracking, order ID visibility, and full attribution to media exposure.

whyBothWin.title: Why Both Glass Meadows and Partnered Retailers Win
whyBothWin.description: Advertising drives consumer demand for Glass Meadows while retailers gain qualified traffic, new customers, repeat engagement, and faster product sell-through.

benefits.title: Media That Moves Units
benefits.description: High-intent placements across ESPN, HGTV, Food Network, HBO Max, Paramount+, NBC, ABC, and more

benefits.title: Net-New Shoppers
benefits.description: A21+ audiences + mainstream reach drive incremental demand.

benefits.title: Closed-Loop Attribution
benefits.description: Measure units, revenue, ROAS,conversions, timestamps, and Order IDs.

title: Eureka
description: Co-Op Advertising Program With Eureka To Drive Sell-Thru And Measurable Online Sales

howItWorks.title: Brand funds the display flight (monthly subscription).
JC delivers best-in-class programmatic display (prospecting, conquesting, retargeting).
JC Pixel attributes SKU-level sales back to media.
JointCommerce builds all ad creatives as an added value - approved by Eureka.

campaignStrategy.description: JointCommerce geo-targets first-party shoppers across our curated publisher network on mobile, tablet, and desktop, driving them directly to the Eureka product page on partnered retailers' online menus.
campaignStrategy.technology: Our pixel technology dynamically retargets high-intent shoppers who abandon carts or leave before completing their purchase, bringing them back to their last point of engagement.
campaignStrategy.reporting: All Eureka sales are tracked down to the product and order ID within the JointCommerce real-time reporting dashboard.

whyBothWin.title: Why Both Eureka and Partnered Retailers Win
whyBothWin.description: Advertising drives consumer demand for Eureka while retailers gain qualified traffic, new customers, repeat engagement, and faster product sell-through.

benefits.title: Media That Moves Units
benefits.description: High-intent placements across ESPN, HGTV, Food Network, HBO Max, Paramount+, NBC, ABC, and more.

benefits.title: Net-New Shoppers
benefits.description: A21+ audiences + mainstream reach drive incremental demand.

benefits.title: Closed-Loop Attribution
benefits.description: Measure units, revenue, ROAS, conversions, timestamps, and Order IDs.
